title: Surgeon Vacancy at Drishti Eye Care - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Drishti Eye Care - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Drishti Eye Care, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Surgeon for our Ranchi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Drishti Eye Care:
Drishti Eye Care is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Drishti Eye Care!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
